answer: AMER led with $2.84M in revenue across 5,128 paid/shipped orders this quarter; the full per-region breakdown is in the structured payload.

citations.snippet: GraphQL: orders(filter:{status:[PAID,SHIPPED], placedAt:{gte:"2026-04-01"}}) { aggregate { groupBy: region, sum: totalAmount, count: orderId } }

routing_decision.rationale: The question is a revenue-and-volume rollup over orders filtered by status and quarter. The storefront domain owns Order.total_amount and Order.status and computes sum/count deterministically via its GraphQL aggregate resolver, so it was queried directly. No other domain contributes order-level revenue, so no fan-out was needed.

alternative_routings.reason: Single-domain routing: storefront-graphql resolves the region group-by, status filter, and the sum/count aggregations server-side in one query.
